nodes.label: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Defines a PostgreSQL 15-alpine service named intellirender_db on port 5432 with a persistent pgdata volume.

edges.note: docker-compose spins up the PostgreSQL instance that lib/db/index.ts connects to

hyperedges.relation: Collectively implement the persistence layer: docker-compose runs PostgreSQL, lib/db/schema.ts defines tables, lib/db/index.ts creates the Drizzle ORM connection.
